title: lotus hispidus subsp. levieri
intro: Lotus hispidus subsp. levieri, also known as Levieri's lotus, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exerting antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, Levieri's lotus is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal teas and tinctures.
